shoes.name: Basic Trainers
shoes.description: They'll get you to the finish line. Probably.

shoes.name: Cushioned Road Shoe
shoes.description: Plush cushioning for the road. Your knees will thank you.

shoes.name: Trail Running Shoes
shoes.description: Aggressive lugs for dirt and rocks. Awkward on pavement.

shoes.name: Carbon Racer
shoes.description: Carbon-plated super shoe. 4% faster on roads. Fragile.

shoes.name: Premium Trail Shoe
shoes.description: Aggressive lugs, rock plate. Made for the mountains.

shoes.name: Ultra Cushion
shoes.description: Maximum cushion for maximum miles. Built to last.

shoes.name: Elite Daily Trainer
shoes.description: The shoe top runners train in. Fast enough to race, comfortable enough for daily miles.

shoes.name: Super Shoe (Next%)
shoes.description: The fastest shoe ever made. Carbon plate, PEBA foam, 15% speed boost. Burns through in 100 miles. Worth every penny on race day.

apparel.name: Cotton T-Shirt
apparel.description: The shirt you already own. Cotton kills, but it's free.

apparel.name: Tech Tee
apparel.description: Moisture-wicking. The first upgrade every runner makes. Keeps you cooler, run longer.

apparel.name: Basketball Shorts
apparel.description: Heavy, baggy, and not meant for running. But hey, they were free.

apparel.name: Split Shorts
apparel.description: Built-in liner. No underwear required. Lighter and faster than anything in your closet.

apparel.name: Running Socks
apparel.description: Thin, moisture-wicking, and worth every penny.

apparel.name: Racing Singlet
apparel.description: Lightweight race-day singlet. Every gram counts.

apparel.name: Rain Jacket
apparel.description: Packable and breathable. Required gear for some races.

apparel.name: Sun Hat
apparel.description: Keeps the sun off your face. Surprisingly important.

apparel.name: Compression Socks
apparel.description: Graduated compression. Recovery starts during the run.

apparel.name: Elite Race Kit
apparel.description: Ultralight race-day kit. Aerodynamic fit, barely-there weight. What the pros wear.

apparel.name: Compression Tights
apparel.description: Full-length compression. Reduces muscle vibration, speeds recovery, looks fast.

accessories.name: GPS Watch (Basic)
accessories.description: Track your pace, distance, and heart rate. The first real upgrade.

accessories.name: GPS Watch (Advanced)
accessories.description: Training load, recovery advisor, route mapping. Data nerd paradise.

accessories.name: Foam Roller
accessories.description: Hurts so good. Speeds up recovery between workouts.

accessories.name: Massage Gun
accessories.description: Percussive therapy. Your muscles will thank you.

accessories.name: Headlamp (Basic)
accessories.description: 200 lumens. Enough for dark morning runs.

accessories.name: Compression Recovery Boots
accessories.description: Pneumatic compression boots. The ultimate recovery tool. Used by every pro team.

accessories.name: Heart Rate Chest Strap
accessories.description: Precise heart rate data. Train smarter, not harder. Keeps you in the right zone.

accessories.name: Hydration Vest
accessories.description: 2L capacity with flask pockets. Stay hydrated on long runs. Essential for ultras.

consumables.name: Basic Energy Gel
consumables.description: Basic energy gel. 100 calories of quick fuel. Tastes like sweet paste.

consumables.name: Electrolyte Mix
consumables.description: Mix into your water. Keeps the cramps away.

consumables.name: Energy Chews
consumables.description: Fruit-flavored energy chews. Easy on the stomach.

consumables.name: Caffeinated Gel
consumables.description: Caffeinated energy gel. The kick when you need it most. Careful — too much caffeine on an untrained gut is trouble.

consumables.name: Electrolyte Gummies
consumables.description: Electrolyte gummies with sodium and potassium. Fight the cramps.

consumables.name: Snack Bar
consumables.description: Oat and honey bar. Real food for real miles. Takes a trained gut to digest mid-run.

consumables.name: Stroopwafel
consumables.description: Dutch caramel waffle. The perfect mid-run treat. Runners swear by these.

consumables.name: Premium Hydrogel
consumables.description: Hydrogel technology. Goes down smooth, no water needed. Science in a packet.

consumables.name: PB&J Sandwich
consumables.description: PB&J on white bread. The ultra runner's secret weapon. Cheap, dense, perfect — if your gut can handle solid food at pace.

consumables.name: Boiled Potato
consumables.description: Salted boiled potato. Sounds weird. Tastes like heaven at mile 50. The cheapest, most effective fuel — but only veterans can stomach it mid-race.

consumables.name: Recovery Drink
consumables.description: Post-run recovery shake. Protein and carbs in one.
